title: Strategic Comparison Lens
subtitle: Summarize the comparison through three dimensions before detailed evidence.
footerText: Red Blue Professional | Three Topic Cards

cards.title: Scale Advantage
cards.description: China anchors the comparison with a larger consumer base, manufacturing depth, and broad domestic demand.

cards.title: Maturity Signal
cards.description: Japan provides a benchmark for quality, advanced manufacturing, and institutional market maturity.

cards.title: Innovation Momentum
cards.description: Korea highlights high R&D intensity, semiconductor leadership, and fast global cultural diffusion.

insightText: Use this page when the audience needs the comparison logic before reviewing detailed evidence.
